disambiguated.context: The debate was down to the final two participants, the British student and the American student, when it had to be called off because of an uproar following a racist remark on stage. The topic was sensitive but it was expected that the participants would handle it with care. The British student addressed a minority with a racial slur and was subsequently disqualified, handing the victory to the American student.
